contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 120
- Description: Oracle identity flow fixed + deployed, prod outage diagnosed & hotfixed, resend handed off, agent-attribution convention
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/oracle/pull/35
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/oracle/pull/40
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/355
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/361
  
  Details:
  Multi-part oracle.truesight.me work. (1) Fixed and shipped the DAO-identity linking flow (oracle PR #35): sign only the canonical payload up to the -------- separator (the generation-source was signed after it, which Edgar ignores → signature_verification failed); keep the Timestamp nonce inside the signed body so the persistent oracle key yields a unique signature (fixes 409) while still verifying; derive generation source from window.location so the verification email returns to the registering origin; three explicit UI states (pending / verified / unlinked) driven by check_digital_signature with a same-device caveat; retire the stale cache-first service worker via a self-unregistering kill switch. (2) Drafted RESEND_VERIFICATION_PLAN.md and handed it to Sophia via the governor-signed ping_sophia trigger — she opened Telegram topic 'Resend verification email' (thread 1504); recorded in SOPHIA_HANDOFFS with the rejoin session_id. (3) Diagnosed and hotfixed a full production outage (oracle PR #40): Sophia's later PRs #36/#38/#39 broke oracle.truesight.me — #36 introduced JS SyntaxErrors in index.html (apostrophe in a single-quoted string + \n escapes saved as literal newlines), and #38/#39 refactored to @truesight/dao-client which does not exist on npm (unpkg 404), gutting working inline code. Reverted the CDN refactor + broken resend, restored index.html to last-known-good, verified the inline JS parses, deployed. (4) Added a mandatory agent-attribution convention (agentic_ai_context PR #361, GITHUB_AGENTIC_AI_SSH.md): every AI-agent commit + PR must carry a 'Generated-by: <agent>' marker so agents are distinguishable from human commits (the outage was unattributable because Sophia's PRs authored as the human operator). Prompted Sophia, who acknowledged, committed to the trailer + no-unpublished-deps rule, and is adding a node --check syntax-guard CI to the oracle repo.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 200.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
